description: channel from CHEMIST to BIOLOGIST for compound sample
channel from BIOLOGIST to ANALYST for test results
channel from ANALYST to CHEMIST for quality report
CHEMIST must analyze raw materials before purifying
BIOLOGIST runs bioassay only after receiving compound
ANALYST analyzes only after receiving test results
CHEMIST validates only after receiving quality report
CHEMIST (spec->cent) and BIOLOGIST (cent->spec) use instruments in opposite order
CHEMIST must release SPECTROMETER before waiting for ANALYST report, since ANALYST needs it
all three scientists can start working concurrently
